_about: Creative Library registry (repo/config, evidence-first), Property Pulse pilot. v0.2 evolves to the Creative Library v2 model (Governed Creative Design System): Style Guide -> (governs) -> Assets + Patterns (SIBLING libraries; patterns may reference assets) -> (compose) -> Template Families -> (instantiate as) -> Creative Instances -> Evidence. Asset references use asset_key (governed in c.client_brand_asset via resolve_brand_assets), never raw URLs. Schema: docs/creative-library/registry-schema-v2.md.
model: style_guide -> (governs) -> assets + patterns -> (compose) -> template_families -> (instantiate as) -> creative_instances -> evidence

posture.declarative_only: Declarative only — not consumed by production workers.
posture.pk_approval: PK approval authority unchanged; AI proposes, never approves
posture.vendoring_drift_note: The dashboard vendors a COPY of this file (lib/creative-library/registry.ts @ a prior source_commit); the dashboard does NOT read these v0.2 fields and must be re-vendored if/when a dashboard lane (A1.5) surfaces them.

palette.note: Derived (declarative) from the proven PP News templates; formal palette pending PK.
palette.scrim: dark scrim ~#0B1220 at ~62% opacity (from the proven caption scrim)

spacing.note: Declarative placeholder — side margins + safe-area bands per the proven templates; formalisation pending.

safe_area_rules.note: 9:16 reserves top/bottom brand bands (per video-worker layout, y140 / y1620); 16:9 uses a centred scrim. Declarative reference.

scrim_rules.applies_when: a background photo is present (backgrounds flagged needs_scrim)

voice_tone_rules.note: Property market news — factual, concise. Formalisation pending PK.

accessibility_rules.note: Text-over-image contrast via scrim; min font sizes per the proven templates. Formalisation pending PK.

evidence.notes: Declarative DRAFT derived from the proven PP News templates; NOT independently proven. A style guide is not a render-based object — no render_log_id is claimed.

layout_rules.note: Brand bars + logo (or wordmark fallback) + footer label. Declarative; maps to Logo.source + Footer.text (documentation only, not a runtime binding).

evidence.notes: Decomposition of the proven PP News templates; NOT independently proven as a pattern object.

layout_rules.note: Centred headline + subtitle over scrim. Maps to Headline.text + Subtitle.text (documentation only).

evidence.notes: Decomposition of the proven PP News templates; NOT independently proven.

layout_rules.note: Stat-reveal composition (used by the animated 9:16 video-stat variant). Declarative only.
Category badge + location/date line. Maps to CategoryBadge.text / Location.text / Date.text (documentation only).
Full-bleed background photo + dark scrim for legibility. Maps to Background.source + scrim (documentation only). Backgrounds are flagged needs_scrim.

evidence.notes: Decomposition; NOT independently proven. References the 3 governed PP backgrounds (all exist in c.client_brand_asset).

The family object is a COMPOSITION, not a single render — it holds NO independent render-based proof (proof_status=unproven, render_log_id=null). Proof lives at the VARIANT level: centred-scrim-16x9 (Gate C, render_log_id 7243e040-2ef2-4d08-902b-94cee26af2d3) and centred-scrim-9x16-video (Gate D2, render_log_id 508b4365-9dfc-4ec8-b491-2a3a1014d26b) are each independently proven. See proven_variants.
Gate C ICE-controlled template smoke (registers v3.81). Also has a governed manual render 'e7d096b8-6d6c-4af8-a245-dc35f83bd291' (Intake Lane 3B) with resolver_used=true / fallback_taken=false.
Gate D2 ICE-controlled animated/video template smoke (registers v3.82).

creative_instances._note: Creative Instances are NOT authored here — they are produced render events represented by m.post_render_log + render_spec.template + render_spec.qa. The registry declares families/variants; instances live in the evidence spine.

known_instances.notes: Intake Lane 3B governed render; resolver_used=true, fallback_taken=false.

_implementations_note: v0.1 LEGACY view — superseded by template_families[] in v0.2; retained verbatim for back-compat / traceability. New work should read template_families[].
carries: A1.2 Pattern Library v1 — formalise the draft patterns (and Style Guide v1 in A1.3); they remain draft/unproven until then.
Style Guide + Patterns are declarative DRAFTs derived from the proven templates — NOT independently proven; no render_log_id is claimed for them.
Field -> Creatomate modification-key mapping is documented in pattern layout_rules as REFERENCE only; binding stays a future worker/render lane (no production consumption).
Registry vendoring drift: the dashboard's vendored copy predates v0.2 and does not read the new fields (re-vendor under A1.5).
No registry consumer wired (no worker/advisor/publish/dashboard reads this file) — intentional; declarative only.
